results.title: Duplicate Characters in List of Strings
results.description: Write a program to find duplicate characters across a list of strings ["hello", "world"]. Print the duplicate characters sorted alphabetically.

results.title: First and Last Position of Element
results.description: Write a program to find the first and last position (0-based index) of a given element in a sorted array. If not found, print "Element not found".
